recommendations.title: Assimilate
recommendations.overview: Three friends making a web series about their town discover that their neighbors are being killed and replaced by creatures who are perfect copies of their victims.

recommendations.title: The Boy
recommendations.overview: An intimate portrait of a 9 year old sociopath as he discovers his taste for killing.

recommendations.title: Appearances
recommendations.overview: Ève and Henri are among the happy few of the French community in Vienna. They are “la crème de la crème”. The perfect picture crumbles when Ève discovers that Henri is cheating on her. On an impulse, she finds revenge with Jonas, a perfect young Aust

recommendations.title: Bingo Hell
recommendations.overview: In the barrio of Oak Springs lives a strong and stubborn group of elderly friends who refuse to be gentrified. Their leader, Lupita, keeps them together as a community, a family. But little did they know, their beloved bingo hall is about to be sold

recommendations.title: Fresh
recommendations.overview: Frustrated by scrolling dating apps only to end up on lame, tedious dates, Noa takes a chance by giving her number to the awkwardly charming Steve after a produce-section meet-cute at the grocery store.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn
recommendations.overview: A traveling couple end up in an abandoned Nebraska town inhabited by a cult of murderous children who worship a demon that lives in the local cornfields.

recommendations.title: Phantoms
recommendations.overview: In the peaceful Colorado town of Snowfield, something evil has wiped out the community. And now, it's up to a group of people to stop it, or at least get out of Snowfield alive.

recommendations.title: Jimmy's Hall
recommendations.overview: Jimmy Gralton returns from New York and reopens his beloved community hall, only to meet opposition from the local parish.

recommendations.title: SS Experiment Love Camp
recommendations.overview: Near the end of WW2, prisoners of war are used in experiments to perfect the Arian race.

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn
recommendations.overview: A traveling couple end up in an abandoned Nebraska town inhabited by a cult of murderous children who worship a demon that lives in the local cornfields.
